channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Premiers Call for Increased Provincial Input on Judicial Appointments
item.description: The premiers of Ontario, Quebec, Alberta, and Saskatchewan have sent a letter to Prime Minister Mark Carney requesting a larger role in the selection of judges for superior trial courts and courts of ...

item.title: Personal Reflections on Pluralism and Tolerance from Sri Lanka’s Civil War
item.description: In this reflective piece, a personality psychologist who grew up in Sri Lanka shares how his experiences during the country’s civil war (1983–2009) shaped his understanding of pluralism. Raised in the...

item.title: Australian shares set to rise as Ares restricts private credit fund withdrawals
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open higher, with ASX 200 futures up 48 points to 8465, trimming earlier gains of more than 75 points. US equities showed mixed performance, with the S&P 500 down 0.2...

item.title: Philippines Declares National Energy Emergency Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. declared a national energy emergency on March 24, 2026, due to disruptions caused by the ongoing war between the US, Israel, and Iran. The conflict has signif...

item.title: Kibra Court to Decide on Raphael Tuju's Bail and Case Jurisdiction
item.description: Nairobi – The Kibra Court is set to make a ruling at noon on Wednesday regarding former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju’s challenge to the DCI case against him and his application for bail pending arra...

item.title: Power Ministry outlines plans to restore electricity supply within two weeks
item.description: Adebayo Adelabu, di Minister of Power, don yan say government dey put measures to fix di wahala wey dey gas supply wey dey affect power supply for Nigeria. For press conference wey happen for Abuja on...

item.title: Mel Schilling, Dating Expert from MAFS, Dies from Terminal Colon Cancer at 54
item.description: Mel Schilling, the well-known relationship expert from 'Married At First Sight' (MAFS), has sadly passed away at the age of 54, following a battle with terminal colon cancer. Diagnosed in 2023, Schill...

item.title: Tshwane officials probed for allegedly enabling irregular R59.1m payments to cartel-linked security company
item.description: Two senior officials in the City of Tshwane, deputy commissioner Umashi Dlhamini and CFO Gareth Mnisi, have been placed at the centre of an alleged scheme that allowed a security firm, Gubis85 Solutio...

item.title: Sindh Government Considers Smart Lockdown to Save Fuel Amid Global Oil Crisis from Middle East Conflict
item.description: Sindh Local Government Minister Nasir Hussain Shah stated on Tuesday that the provincial government is thinking about imposing a smart lockdown to conserve fuel in view of the global oil crisis caused...

item.title: 32 Tanzanian students head to Ireland for studies in data science and AI
item.description: Tanzania is sending 32 bright students to Ireland under the Samia Extended Scholarship Programme (DS/AI+) to pursue undergraduate studies in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and related fields a...

item.title: AJK PM criticizes Indian court's sentencing of Kashmiri women activists
item.description: Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) Prime Minister Raja Faisal Mumtaz Rathore condemned the life imprisonment sentence of Kashmiri leader Asiya Andrabi and the 30-year sentences of her associates, Fehmida So...

item.title: 33 Bodies, Mostly Children, Exhumed from Mass Grave in Kericho Cemetery After Secret Transport from Nyamira
item.description: Investigators in Kericho County have uncovered a total of 33 bodies buried in a mass grave at a local cemetery, with 25 of them being children and eight adults. The shocking discovery started after re...

item.title: Five La Union towns roll out fuel subsidies for farmers, fisherfolk, and tricycle drivers amid rising petroleum costs
item.description: In response to the recent spike in fuel prices, five municipal governments in La Union province have extended fuel subsidies to help ease the burden on local farmers, fisherfolk, and tricycle drivers ...

item.title: Qatar’s LNG terminal damage could take years to repair, impacting India’s energy costs
item.description: On March 19, Qatar’s largest liquefied natural gas (LNG) terminal, Ras Laffan, was severely damaged by Iranian missile and drone strikes, causing substantial fires and damage to a crucial part of the ...

item.title: Best seasons for a European river cruise in 2026 according to Viking Cruises
item.description: Australian travellers planning a European river cruise in 2026 face an important choice when selecting the right season, as each offers distinct experiences along rivers such as the Rhine, Danube, Rho...

item.title: Fuel Price Hikes Reduce Manila Jeepney Drivers' Daily Income
item.description: Manila's jeepney drivers are facing significant challenges due to the rising cost of fuel, which is directly affecting their daily income. Many drivers report that the increase in gasoline and diesel ...

item.title: APC South East Zonal Congress to Hold Tomorrow at Hotel Presidential in Enugu
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) for the South East region of Nigeria dey ready to hold their zonal congress tomorrow, Wednesday, 25th March 2026, for the Multipurpose Hall of Hotel Presidential we...

item.title: Rachel Reeves' response to Trump’s war costs lacks real clarity or solutions
item.description: Rachel Reeves, the Chancellor of the Exchequer, faced significant challenges in her recent Commons speech as she sought to address the economic impact of Donald Trump's ongoing war. Just weeks after d...

item.title: PAGASA forecasts humid and hotter conditions as dry season officially starts nationwide
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) announced that the dry season has begun, bringing humid and hotter weather across the Philippines. Weather spe...

item.title: El-Rufai Arraigned in Kaduna Court as Defence Challenges Justice Aikawa Over Bias Petition
item.description: Former Kaduna State Governor, Nasir El-Rufai, on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, appeared before the Federal High Court in Kaduna for his arraignment on charges brought by the Independent Corrupt Practices a...
